hero_title: Artisanal Soaps that Care for Your Skin
hero_description: Discover the essence of nature in every bar. Made with 100% natural ingredients, our soaps transport you to a world of pure aromas and soft textures that transform your daily routine into a special moment.
benefit_natural_description: Pure ingredients from nature, without harsh chemicals
benefit_handmade_description: Each bar is unique, created with care and attention to detail
benefit_eco_description: Sustainable packaging and environmentally respectful processes
eutrophication_description: Eutrophication is the excessive enrichment of a body of water with nutrients such as phosphorus and nitrogen, mainly from human activities. This causes massive algal blooms, the death of aquatic vegetation, and a drastic decrease in dissolved oxygen.
step_water_description: Uncontrolled growth of algae and aquatic plants
step_oxygen_description: Bacteria consume large amounts of oxygen
step_suffocation_description: Lack of oxygen causes death of fish and organisms
chemical_parabens_description: Preservatives suspected of being endocrine disruptors
chemical_triclosan_description: Antibacterial agent toxic to aquatic organisms
chemical_phthalates_description: Hidden chemicals in 'fragrances' that are endocrine disruptors
chemical_sls_description: Surfactant that produces foam but is a strong irritant
action_phosphate_free_description: Look for labels that say 'Phosphate-Free' or 'Biodegradable'
action_bar_soap_description: They contain fewer synthetic chemicals and less water than liquid ones
action_avoid_chemicals_description: Do not buy products containing Triclosan, Parabens or Microplastics
action_local_brands_description: Support local producers with transparent and natural formulas
action_minimal_use_description: Reduce the amount of soap to the minimum needed to clean
action_multipurpose_description: Use the same natural soap for body and hands
action_avoid_natural_water_title: Avoid Using Soap in Natural Water Bodies
action_avoid_natural_water_description: Never wash directly in rivers or lakes when outdoors
action_qr_code_description: Educate others about eutrophication and the importance of changing soap
action_check_labels_description: Apply what you learned about phosphates and parabens to detergents and cleaning products
action_request_eco_description: Ask supermarkets and stores to increase their inventory of phosphate-free products
products_hero_description: Discover our line of 100% natural artisanal soaps. Each bar is made with pure ingredients that care for your skin and the environment.
product_rice_description: Softens and revitalizes skin with natural rice extracts. Ideal for all skin types.
product_apple_description: Fun apple shape with antioxidant properties. Perfect for sensitive skin.
product_combo_square_description: Economic pack with 4 natural rice soaps. Save money and care for your skin.
product_combo_apple_description: 4 apple-shaped soaps. Fun and nutritious for your skin.
benefit_handmade_description2: Each bar is unique and artisanal
about_school_tag: Colegio Fernando Llort Choussy | Habilitación Laboral course
about_hero_description: We are students from Colegio Fernando Llort Choussy in El Salvador, representing our school through the Habilitación Laboral course and turning classroom learning into action with natural soaps and environmental awareness.
about_mission_text1: To promote a school-based environmental initiative through handmade natural soaps, pairing each product with a QR code that shares practical information about healthier choices and responsible consumption.
about_mission_text2: Along the way, we are learning to research, collaborate, communicate, and turn what we study in Habilitación Laboral into a real project that benefits our community.
about_vision_text1: To represent Colegio Fernando Llort Choussy with a project that shows how students can lead positive change while building useful skills for the future.
about_vision_text2: We want this experience to inspire more students to choose sustainable habits, value teamwork, and see learning as something that can improve everyday life in El Salvador.
about_team_subtitle: The students leading this project and representing Colegio Fernando Llort Choussy.
about_gallery_subtitle: How we learn, create, and work together
about_gallery_item1_description: Each bar is created with selected natural ingredients
about_gallery_item4_description: We learn and grow together through every stage of the project
about_impact_description: As students of Colegio Fernando Llort Choussy, we created this project to connect learning with service and show that education can inspire real change inside and outside the classroom.
about_cta_description: Every purchase supports our school project and helps us continue learning, sharing, and promoting more sustainable habits in El Salvador.
footer_description: Artisanal soaps that care for your skin and the environment. 100% natural ingredients, made with love and responsibility.
